summary: Full end-to-end demo-mode UI test executed against the physician account. Login → dashboard, mock credit purchase (starter +10), 4-step PA wizard (Capture upload image → dummy 'Jane A. Doe' / Blue Shield of California / E11.9 extracted, Dictate insert-template, Validate with pre-selected E11.9 crosswalk, Run AI analysis) all worked. All 4 result panels rendered with expected dummy data (78% approval, Low denial risk, 3 suggestions, cover letter subject 'Prior Authorization' + portal 'Availity Essentials'). Credit was consumed (52 → 51) after analysis. End-session button returns to dashboard.

issues: React hydration warning in console: `<button data-testid="capture-remove-{slot}">` is nested inside the parent `<button data-testid="capture-slot-{slot}">` in /app/frontend/src/components/wizard/CaptureStep.js (buttons cannot be descendants of buttons). Not blocking functionality, but should be replaced with a div/span + onClick + stopPropagation, or the outer button should become a div with role='button'.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix nested-button DOM warning in CaptureStep.js (capture-remove-* inside capture-slot-*) to remove the console hydration error.

MINOR: Playwright interactions on some buttons flagged 'element not stable' due to fade-in animations; adding a small settle delay or `animate-fade-in-up` completion class helps but not required for real users.
critical_code_review_comments: CaptureStep.js line ~85: <button> nested in <button> — invalid HTML, causes React hydration console error. Refactor to a div/span with role='button' and onKeyDown for accessibility.

Wizard credit balance is only refreshed on onExit / after generate; user should not see stale count if navigating away mid-flow. Currently ok because refreshUser is called in ValidateStep after generate.
DictationStep depends on browser SpeechRecognition; already gracefully degrades with `supported=false` and lets user type — good.
seed_data_creation: None. Ran 1 mock purchase (+10 credits) and 1 analysis (-1 credit) on the existing physician account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DEMO_MODE=true works end-to-end via UI. File input for capture-input-* is class='hidden' — use set_input_files() directly on the input selector; do NOT wait_for_selector with default visibility. Also, some buttons animate in (animate-fade-in-up) — use force=True clicks. To navigate to Buy Credits, either click [data-testid='buy-credits-btn'] on dashboard (may need force click after animation settles) or navigate directly to /buy-credits.
